summary: Build and improve the NutritionXP e-commerce website, focusing on making the provided HTML/CSS fully responsive across all screen sizes (mobile, tablet, desktop).

existing_features.title: Implement the NutritionXP storefront UI from the provided HTML into the existing React + Tailwind app and make all pages/sections fully responsive across common breakpoints (mobile 320px+, tablet 768px+, desktop 1024px+), eliminating horizontal overflow and layout breakage.

Make the header/navigation responsive by adding a mobile-friendly navigation pattern (e.g., hamburger menu or collapsible drawer), ensuring the logo, nav links, and cart icon remain accessible on small screens.

Refactor fixed/inline sizing in the provided design into responsive Tailwind styles (or equivalent responsive CSS) so hero typography, section paddings, card layouts, and footer columns scale smoothly across breakpoints.

Ensure all interactive storefront flows remain usable on touch devices: product cards, product detail quantity selector, add-to-cart, cart quantity controls, checkout flow, order history, and notification modal (including scroll locking and viewport-fit positioning).

Choose and apply a coherent visual theme for the responsive React implementation that matches the NutritionXP supplement storefront domain and remains consistent across pages (colors, typography, spacing, and component styling). Avoid blue/purple as primary accents.

new_feature_requests.summary: Make the provided NutritionXP website fully responsive on all screen sizes (mobile/tablet/desktop).
